plugins.name: thermos

plugins.name: ralph-wiggum
plugins.description: Autonomous AI agent loop that runs Claude Code repeatedly until all PRD items are complete. Each iteration spawns a fresh instance with clean context; memory persists via git history, progress.txt, and prd.json.
